hero.lede: Manometr is the authoritative source for industrial pressure instrumentation in Uzbekistan and the CIS. Every product page carries the full specification, datasheet, and real-world application notes engineers need to specify with confidence.

solutions.title: Industries we serve
solutions.lede: Oil & gas, chemical processing, energy, water treatment — instruments and technical solutions matched to each industry's specifying requirements.

fact1.title: Calibration
fact1.body: Certified calibration at an accredited laboratory, conforming to UzStandart and GOST requirements.

fact2.title: Warranty
fact2.body: 24-month factory warranty and full technical support across every instrument we supply.

fact3.title: Certification
fact3.body: Original equipment carrying ISO 9001, GOST R, EAC, and UzStandart certificates of conformity.
